idea-plugin.name: CC Terminal
idea-plugin.description:
A super-lightweight terminal plugin for Claude Code in IntelliJ IDEA.

Why CC Terminal?

  • Ultra-lightweight — Only ~1.6 MB, zero extra resource overhead. Uses IDEA's built-in Terminal engine.
  • Native terminal experience — Identical look, feel, and behavior to IDEA's built-in terminal. Zero learning curve.
  • One-click --dangerously-skip-permissions — Pre-configured command presets. Launch Claude Code in skip-permissions mode with a single click.
  • Rich text input — Multi-line input panel where Enter sends and Shift+Enter inserts a newline. Paste multi-line content without accidental sends.
  • Flexible mode toggle — Switch between multi-line input mode and direct terminal mode with Ctrl+Shift+M. Use arrow keys and Enter for native terminal interaction.

Usage

  1. Open CC Terminal from the bottom toolbar.
  2. Select a command from the dropdown (default: claude --dangerously-skip-permissions).
  3. Click Run to start Claude Code.
  4. Type in the input area and press Enter to send, or Shift+Enter for a new line.
